text: # This docker image sets CI=1 which breaks interactive things
RUN apt-get install -y cmake ninja-build clang
RUN apt-get install -y dwarfdump ccache lld
RUN apt-get install -y libdw-dev # for source build of rocprofiler-sdk

dockerfile.bash-print-text:
echo 'RUN usermod -l wgh $(getent passwd ' $UID '| cut -d : -f 1)' '||' 'useradd -u' $UID 'wgh 
 RUN chsh -s /bin/zsh wgh'
